title: dunniella
intro: Dunniella, also known as Dunaliella salina, is a single-celled green algae found in saltwater environments such as salt lakes and coastal areas. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including beta-carotene, vitamins, and minerals, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dunniella include its potential to improve eye health, boost the immune system, and reduce oxidative stress. Dunniella is often prepared as a supplement or herbal extract, and can be found in various forms, including capsules, powders, and oils.
